event: View of the Molo and Riva degli Schiavoni from St. Mark's Basin
description: A veduta painting showing the Venetian waterfront from the Basin of St. Mark. On the left, the distinctive Gothic facade of the Doge's Palace with its patterned stonework is visible alongside a bridge. A large arcaded building spans the center. Various boats and gondolas populate the blue-green waters of the lagoon, with gondoliers at work. Buildings line the waterfront on both sides, and the sky is bright with cumulus clouds. The architectural detail is precise, and the light is warm and atmospheric.

_meta.title: The Molo and the Riva degli Schiavoni from the St. Mark's Basin
